question: What is BaEV's receptor on human HSCs, and what's the published evidence for its transduction efficiency on quiescent CD34+ cells?

e680a46f-849b-43e7-bb39-2d48f8a486d8.title: Transduction of Quiescent Human Hematopoietic Stem and Progenitor Cells Using Lentiviral Vectors and Virus-Like Particles.

cb6d178a-1059-4064-836f-db58103398f7.title: Baboon envelope pseudotyped LVs outperform VSV-G-LVs for gene transfer into early-cytokine-stimulated and resting HSCs.

4ec48e08-55f3-47f3-b2d1-d044ca3e88e8.title: Characterization of a third generation lentiviral vector pseudotyped with Nipah virus envelope proteins for endothelial cell transduction.

59fe1150-66ae-448d-a007-d122139ef727.title: Targeted transduction of CD34+ hematopoietic progenitor cells in nonpurified human mobilized peripheral blood mononuclear cells.

34ff7940-e6e4-48d6-b5e1-a2c16f3fce30.title: Assessing the Impact of Cyclosporin A on Lentiviral Transduction and Preservation of Human Hematopoietic Stem Cells in Clinically Relevant  Gene Therapy Settings.

claims.text: BaEVRLess-pseudotyped vectors target the neutral amino acid transporters ASCT1 and ASCT2 on hematopoietic stem and progenitor cells.

citations.verbatim_quote: we use LV vectors and eVLPs pseudotyped with the modified baboon endogenous retroviral glycoprotein BaEVRLess, which targets the neutral amino acid transporters ASCT1 and ASCT2 on HSPCs

claims.text: BaEVRLess-pseudotyped LV vectors achieve higher gene transfer efficiencies into freshly isolated or thawed unstimulated HSPCs than VSVg-pseudotyped LV vectors.

citations.verbatim_quote: This envelope enables immediate transduction of freshly isolated or thawed, unstimulated HSPCs with higher gene transfer efficiencies than those obtained with VSVg-pseudotyped LV vectors

claims.text: A single low-dose application of BaEV-pseudotyped LVs under mild cytokine prestimulation resulted in up to 90% transduction of human CD34+ cells.

citations.verbatim_quote: Under mild cytokine prestimulation to preserve the HSC characteristics, a single BaEV-LV application at a low dose, resulted in up to 90% of hCD34(+) cell transduction

claims.text: Low-dose BaEV-LVs efficiently transduced up to 30% of quiescent human CD34+ cells, whereas high-dose VSV-G-LVs were insufficient.

citations.verbatim_quote: these new BaEV-LVs allowed, at low doses, efficient transduction of up to 30% of quiescent hCD34(+) cells, whereas high-dose VSV-G-LVs were insufficient

claims.text: BaEV-LV-transduced human CD34+ cells reconstituted NSG mice while maintaining high transduction levels across all myeloid and lymphoid lineages, including early progenitors, with the pattern confirmed or increased in secondary recipients.

citations.verbatim_quote: reconstitution of NOD/Lt-SCID/γc(-/-) (NSG) mice with BaEV-LV-transduced hCD34(+) cells maintained these high transduction levels in all myeloid and lymphoid lineages, including early progenitors. This transduction pattern was confirmed or even increased in secondary NSG recipient mice

claims.text: BaEV-pseudotyped LVs were generated as high-titer vectors that are resistant to human complement.

citations.verbatim_quote: We generated here high-titer LVs pseudotyped with a baboon retroviral envelope glycoprotein (BaEV-LVs), resistant to human complement
